title: Introducing Cursor for iOS
summary: Cursor released an iOS mobile app that enables users to build software from anywhere by launching always-on cloud agents or remotely controlling agents running on their computer. The app extends Cursor's capabilities to mobile devices.
writeup: Cursor introduces an iOS app that brings its agent workflow to mobile. The app supports two modes: launching always-on cloud agents and remotely controlling agents already running on a personal computer, which lets software work continue away from a desk. The release extends Cursor's existing capabilities to mobile devices.
